findings.title: Missing Content Security Policy (CSP)
findings.detail: No CSP header found. The site is vulnerable to XSS and data injection attacks.
findings.fix: Define a Content-Security-Policy header. Start with: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'

findings.title: Missing Permissions-Policy
findings.detail: Browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) are not explicitly restricted.
findings.fix: Add header: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()

findings.title: Server Version Disclosure
findings.detail: Server header exposes: 'nginx'. Attackers can target specific CVEs.
findings.fix: Configure the web server to suppress or obscure the Server header.
